antigravityPapers.title: On the Alcubierre Warp Metric & Negative Energy Distributions
antigravityPapers.author: Alcubierre M., Harold S.
antigravityPapers.citation: Alcubierre, M. (1994). The warp drive: hyper-fast travel within general relativity. Class. Quantum Grav., 11(5), L73.
antigravityPapers.summary: Proposes a spacetime metric that allows a spacecraft to travel faster than light by expanding space behind it and contracting space in front, creating a warp bubble. Requires negative energy density (exotic matter).

antigravityPapers.title: Casimir Forces and Vacuum Energy Density in Sub-Micron Cavities
antigravityPapers.author: Casimir H., Lamoreaux S.
antigravityPapers.citation: Casimir, H. B. (1948). On the attraction between two perfectly conducting plates. Proc. K. Ned. Akad. Wet., 51, 793.
antigravityPapers.summary: Establishes that quantum electrodynamic fluctuations in vacuum exert an attractive force between two uncharged parallel plates. Successfully measured experimentally with high precision, confirming vacuum energy density changes.

antigravityPapers.title: Quantum Mechanical Gravity-Electromagnetism Coupling: A Superconducting RF Approach
antigravityPapers.author: Podkletnov E., Tajmar M.
antigravityPapers.citation: Podkletnov, E., & Nieminen, R. (1992). A possibility of gravitational force shielding by bulk YBCO superconductor. Physica C, 203(3-4), 441.
antigravityPapers.summary: Describes claims of gravitational mass reduction above a rotating superconducting ceramic disk. Independent replication attempts have set bounds showing no observable force, categorizing it as speculative/experimental anomaly.

antigravityPapers.title: Gravitational Wave Signatures of Spin-2 Massless Bosons in Curved Backgrounds
antigravityPapers.author: Feynman R., Thorne K.
antigravityPapers.citation: Feynman, R. P. (1963). Lectures on Gravitation. Westview Press.
antigravityPapers.summary: Derives the field equations of a massless spin-2 field (the graviton) and shows they are mathematically equivalent to General Relativity at low energies. Highly consistent with all observational gravitational wave data.

antigravityExperiments.title: Casimir Cavity Vacuum Extraction
antigravityExperiments.results: Measured Casimir force of 1.3e-7 N, matching theoretical vacuum density prediction. No anomalous net energy extraction observed.

antigravityExperiments.title: Superconducting RF Gravitational Wave Coupling Test
antigravityExperiments.results: Cryogenic vacuum system seal failure at 4.2K. Cavity lost superconductivity. Test terminated early. No gravity coupling measured.

antigravityExperiments.title: Alcubierre Micro-Bubble Distortion Run #4
antigravityExperiments.parameters: Target Velocity: 1.05c, Shielding: High-density exotic plasma, Negative Energy: -10^12 J
antigravityExperiments.results: Warp metric field sensors detecting minor spatial contraction/expansion. Currently measuring spatial metrics. Speculative concept.

antigravitySimulations.title: Standard Spacetime Curvature Test (1.0 Solar Mass)
antigravitySimulations.creator: Dr. Elena Vance
antigravitySimulations.results: Stable orbit achieved for satellite (mass = 0.01). Spacetime deflection depth of 120 pixels in mesh center.

antigravitySimulations.title: Warp Metric Contour v2 - 1.5c
antigravitySimulations.creator: Dr. Marcus Cole
antigravitySimulations.results: Calculated spatial contraction index of 85% in front, expansion of 85% behind. Peak negative energy density of -1.5e19 J/m^3 required.
